settings.line_linking_description: Connect your LINE account to receive forum notifications via LINE.
settings.line_disconnect_confirm: Are you sure you want to disconnect your LINE account?

settings.line_login_channel_id_help: The Channel ID of your LINE Login Channel from LINE Developers Console.
settings.line_login_channel_secret_help: The Channel Secret of your LINE Login Channel.
settings.line_messaging_token_help: The Long-lived Channel Access Token of your Messaging API Channel.
settings.line_messaging_channel_secret_help: The Channel Secret of your Messaging API Channel (used for Webhook signature verification).
settings.flex_header_color_help: Background color of the notification header bar. Default: #06C755 (LINE Green).
settings.flex_button_color_help: Color of the action button in the notification. Default: #06C755 (LINE Green).
settings.flex_title_color_help: Text color of the discussion title in the notification body. Default: #111111.
settings.use_first_image_as_thumbnail_help: If the post contains an image, use the first image as the Flex Message hero thumbnail.
settings.disabled_notification_types_help: Enter a comma-separated list of notification types you want to prevent from being sent via LINE (e.g., postMentioned, postLiked, newPost, discussionCreated). This will also hide the toggle for these types on the user's settings page.

line_message.notification_newPost: 🔔 New post in a discussion you follow
line_message.connection_success_body: Your LINE account has been connected to {forum} (username: {username}).
line_message.connection_success_features_intro: You will receive forum notifications via LINE when someone:
line_message.connection_success_feature_new_post: 🔔 Posts in a discussion you follow
line_message.connection_success_settings_hint: You can manage your notification preferences in the forum Settings page.
